Powered by GPT-4o Vision

Catch visual regressions before your users do.

AIDQA monitors your web app's UI with pixel-perfect screenshots and GPT-4o Vision. Get alerted when something breaks — without writing a single test.

Start monitoring freeSee how it works

No credit card required · Free tier available

app.aidesignqa.com
Baseline
Current
3.2% drift

AI detected a font-weight change in the hero heading and a spacing shift in the navigation bar.

Everything you need to catch regressions

No test suite. No CI setup. Just a URL and an approved baseline.

Pixel-perfect screenshots

Headless browser captures your pages at any viewport — desktop, tablet, or mobile. Every pixel accounted for.

AI-powered diff analysis

GPT-4o Vision explains what changed and why it matters. Not just a red blob — plain English with severity ratings.

CSS-level change tracking

Detects computed style mutations down to the property level. Know whether it's a font shift or a full layout break.

Automated monitoring

Set a cadence and forget it. AIDQA runs on schedule and alerts when drift exceeds your configured threshold.

How it works

Up and running in under two minutes.

01

Capture your baseline

Point AIDQA at any URL, pick a viewport, and approve the screenshot as your baseline truth.

02

Set up a monitor

AIDQA checks your page on a schedule, comparing each new screenshot pixel-by-pixel against the baseline.

03

Review AI insights

When drift is detected, GPT-4o Vision explains the changes in plain English, with CSS diffs for technical detail.

Simple, transparent pricing

Start free. Scale when you need to.

Free

Free

Perfect for trying AIDQA on a single project.

Get started free
  • 1 monitor
  • 10 runs per month
  • Daily cadence
  • AI diff analysis
  • CSS-level change tracking

Pro

For developers who ship continuously.

For QA teams that need scale.

Start Team
